profile.name: Akshay Kumar Mishra
profile.bio: Revolutionary strategist and tactical genius. Wielder of the Power of Absolute Obedience. Fighting for a world where the weak are not oppressed.

details: Top academic performer across all subjects
Vice President of the Student Council
Champion of the school chess club

projects.title: RescueMesh
projects.description: P2P emergency communication system designed to function without internet connectivity.

projects.title: Talksy
projects.description: Created a revolutionary military organization from scattered resistance groups, becoming the world's most powerful independent army.

projects.title: SafeSphere.AI
projects.description: Diplomatic achievement uniting 47 nations against the Britannian Empire, establishing a democratic world order.

projects.title: NodeFlow
projects.description: Mastered the Power of Absolute Obedience, developing tactical frameworks for its ethical and strategic deployment.

blogs.title: The Power of Geass: Understanding Absolute Obedience
blogs.excerpt: An exploration of the Geass power, its origins from C.C., and the ethical implications of commanding absolute obedience.

blogs.title: Strategic Warfare: Lessons from the Black Rebellion
blogs.excerpt: Breaking down the tactical decisions that led to the success of the Black Rebellion and the liberation of Japan.

blogs.title: Chess and War: The Art of Sacrifice
blogs.excerpt: How the principles of chess apply to real-world strategy, and why sometimes the king must lead from the front.

quotes: The only ones who should kill are those who are prepared to be killed.
If the king doesn't move, then his subjects won't follow.
What do you do when there is an evil you cannot defeat by just means?
I will not repent. This is my path, and I will walk it to the end.
